mapper.sql: SELECT rg.id, rg.owner_id, uo.username AS owner_username, uo.profile_picture_url AS owner_photo, rg.name, rg.slug, rg.description, rg.cover_image_url, rg.group_type, rg.focus_type, rg.member_count, rg.max_members, array_to_string(rg.tags, ',') AS tags, rg.rules, rg.current_read_entity_type, rg.current_read_entity_id, rg.current_read_title, rg.current_read_start, rg.current_read_end, rg.created_at, rg.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_groups (owner_id, name, slug, description, cover_image_url, group_type, focus_type, member_count, max_members, tags, rules, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{groupType}, #{focusType}, 1, #{maxMembers}, #{tags}::text[], #{rules}, TRUE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_groups SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, group_type = #{groupType}, max_members = #{maxMembers}, tags = #{tags}::text[], rules = #{rules}, current_read_entity_type = #{currentReadEntityType}, current_read_entity_id = #{currentReadEntityId}, current_read_title = #{currentReadTitle}, current_read_start = #{currentReadStart}, current_read_end = #{currentReadEnd}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_groups SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reading_groups WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT * FROM reading_groups WHERE slug = #{slug} AND is_active = TRUE

, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM reading_group_members m WHERE m.group_id = rg.id AND m.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND m.is_active = TRUE) ELSE FALSE END AS is_member, (SELECT role FROM reading_group_members m2 WHERE m2.group_id = rg.id AND m2.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND m2.is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1) AS my_role, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM group_join_requests r WHERE r.group_id = rg.id AND r.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND r.status = 'pending') ELSE FALSE END AS has_pending_request FROM reading_groups rg JOIN users uo ON uo.id = rg.owner_id WHERE rg.id = #{groupId} AND rg.is_active = TRUE

, TRUE AS is_member, m.role AS my_role, FALSE AS has_pending_request FROM reading_groups rg JOIN users uo ON uo.id = rg.owner_id JOIN reading_group_members m ON m.group_id = rg.id AND m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_active = TRUE WHERE rg.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY m.joined_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_group_members WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_group_members (group_id, user_id, role, joined_at, is_active) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, NOW(), TRUE) ON CONFLICT (group_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET is_active = TRUE, role = EXCLUDED.role
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_group_members SET role = #{role}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reading_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url, m.role, COALESCE(sp.is_verified, FALSE) AS is_verified, m.joined_at FROM reading_group_members m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = u.id WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY CASE m.role WHEN 'owner' THEN 1 WHEN 'moderator' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, m.joined_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM reading_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE )
SELECT role FROM reading_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_reading_schedules (group_id, entity_type, entity_id, entity_title, entity_slug, chapter_start, chapter_end, chapter_label, start_date, end_date, discussion_prompt, is_completed, created_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{entityTitle}, #{entitySlug}, #{chapterStart}, #{chapterEnd}, #{chapterLabel}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{discussionPrompt}, FALSE, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_reading_schedules SET chapter_start = #{chapterStart}, chapter_end = #{chapterEnd}, chapter_label = #{chapterLabel}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, discussion_prompt = #{discussionPrompt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_reading_schedules SET is_completed = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_reading_schedules WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT s.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_discussions d WHERE d.schedule_id = s.id AND d.is_deleted = FALSE) AS discussion_count FROM group_reading_schedules s WHERE s.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY s.start_date DESC

SELECT s.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_discussions d WHERE d.schedule_id = s.id AND d.is_deleted = FALSE) AS discussion_count FROM group_reading_schedules s WHERE s.group_id = #{groupId} AND s.is_completed = FALSE AND s.end_date >= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY s.start_date ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_discussions (group_id, schedule_id, user_id, parent_id, title, content, entity_type, entity_id, cfi_reference, like_count, reply_count, is_pinned, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{scheduleId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{cfiReference}, 0, 0, FALSE, FALSE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_discussions SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_discussions SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_discussions WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.group_id, d.schedule_id, d.user_id, u.username, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, m.role AS user_role, d.parent_id, d.title, d.content, d.entity_type, d.entity_id, d.cfi_reference, d.like_count, d.reply_count, d.is_pinned, (d.user_id = #{currentUserId}) AS is_owner, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM group_discussion_likes l WHERE l.discussion_id = d.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM group_discussions d JOIN users u ON u.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN reading_group_members m ON m.group_id = d.group_id AND m.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.group_id = #{groupId} AND d.parent_id IS NULL AND d.is_deleted = FALSE AND d.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY d.is_pinned DESC, d.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT d.id, d.group_id, d.schedule_id, d.user_id, u.username, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, m.role AS user_role, d.parent_id, d.title, d.content, d.entity_type, d.entity_id, d.cfi_reference, d.like_count, d.reply_count, d.is_pinned, (d.user_id = #{currentUserId}) AS is_owner, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM group_discussion_likes l WHERE l.discussion_id = d.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM group_discussions d JOIN users u ON u.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN reading_group_members m ON m.group_id = d.group_id AND m.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.parent_id = #{parentId} AND d.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY d.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE group_discussions SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_discussions SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_discussions SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_discussions SET reply_count = GREATEST(0, reply_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_discussion_likes (discussion_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{discussionId}, #{userId}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_discussion_likes WHERE discussion_id = #{discussionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM group_discussion_likes WHERE discussion_id = #{discussionId} AND user_id = #{userId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_join_requests (group_id, user_id, message, status, created_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{message}, 'pending', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_join_requests WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.id, r.group_id, r.user_id, u.username, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, r.message, r.status, r.created_at FROM group_join_requests r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.group_id = #{groupId} AND r.status = 'pending' ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_polls (group_id, created_by, question, options, ends_at, is_closed, created_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{createdBy}, #{question}, #{options}::jsonb, #{endsAt}, FALSE, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_polls SET options = #{options}::jsonb WHERE id = #{pollId}
UPDATE group_polls SET is_closed = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_polls WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.group_id, p.created_by, u.username AS creator_username, p.question, p.options::text AS options, p.ends_at, p.is_closed, p.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_poll_votes WHERE poll_id = p.id) AS total_votes, (SELECT option_id FROM group_poll_votes WHERE poll_id = p.id AND user_id = #{currentUserId} LIMIT 1) AS my_vote_option_id FROM group_polls p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.created_by WHERE p.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_poll_votes (poll_id, user_id, option_id, created_at) VALUES (#{pollId}, #{userId}, #{optionId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_poll_votes WHERE poll_id = #{pollId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_poll_votes WHERE poll_id = #{pollId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url, m.role, COALESCE(sp.is_verified, FALSE) AS is_verified, m.joined_at FROM reading_group_members m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN reading_progress rp ON rp.user_id = u.id AND rp.entity_type = #{entityType} AND rp.entity_id = #{entityId} WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY COALESCE(rp.percentage_completed, 0) DESC LIMIT 20
